scope: wave4 migration: the 2 legacy-parity read streams only (indices, documents); legacy elasticsearch is read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation) despite the catalog labeling this connector destination-elasticsearch/source-elasticsearch -- read internal/connectors/elasticsearch/elasticsearch.go (ground truth): Capabilities.Write is false and Write() unconditionally returns connectors.ErrUnsupportedOperation. The full Elasticsearch REST surface (index/document mutation, cluster/node admin, search DSL beyond a plain from/size scan) is out of scope until a write-capable Pass B, if ever approved.

excluded.reason: cluster info/health root, used only by base.check, not a syncable object stream
legacy connector is read-only; no write action exists to migrate
index deletion; not implemented by legacy, not a read stream
